rollTableId.name: Weather RollTable
rollTableId.hint: Select the rolltable to use for generating weather patterns

updateFrequency.name: Weather Update Frequency (hours)
updateFrequency.hint: How often to roll for new weather (in game hours)

transitionDuration.name: Base Transition Duration (minutes)
transitionDuration.hint: How long weather transitions take (actual duration varies based on pattern compatibility)

announceWeather.name: Announce Weather Changes
announceWeather.hint: Post a chat message when weather changes

whisperToGM.name: Whisper Weather to GM Only
whisperToGM.hint: Only show weather announcements to the GM

dialog.title: Dynamic Weather Control
dialog.noWeather: No weather pattern active. Roll for weather to begin.
